name: ux-skill
description: Design intelligence engine for AI coding. v3.0 — THE BRAIN. A 7-axis synthesizer (warmth/contrast/density/geometry/formality/motion/type_personality) compiles a novel design language per brief. Three auto-dispatched modes: strict_brand / brand_anchor / pure_synthesis. Brand specs are training data, not templates. A local decisions ledger re-ranks the recommender from past wins. 1,243 structured entries across 12 manifests, 25 slash commands, 5 sub-agents, 18 MCP tools, 152 deterministic anti-pattern rules, 160 brand DESIGN specs. Runs in Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, and 14 more IDEs. Offline. Deterministic. No LLM. No telemetry.

plugins.name: ux
plugins.description: v3.0 — THE BRAIN. 25 callable slash commands (recommend, init, stats, discover, frame, audit, critique, a11y, copy, motion, polish, design, system, dashboard, component, fix, case-study, next, expert, research, workshop, lint, evolve, image-to-code, mcp), 5 specialized sub-agents, 18 MCP tools, Python-backed 7-axis synthesizer with triple-mode dispatch (strict_brand / brand_anchor / pure_synthesis), 12 queryable JSON manifests (1,243 entries total), 152-rule deterministic anti-AI-slop linter with 0-100 quality scoring, mandatory 10-field discovery protocol, 160 brand DESIGN.md specs as training data (not templates), local decisions ledger that re-ranks the recommender from past wins, cross-IDE distribution to 17 environments (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot, Gemini, Codex, Cline, Continue, Aider, Zed, JetBrains, etc.). Offline. Deterministic. No LLM. pip install uxskill or npx uxskill init.
